steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: Chicago offers an array of artworks — from sculptures to street murals — to ______ the tastes of art lovers. The blank must describe what diverse artworks do for people with varied preferences: they fulfill or satisfy those tastes completely.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'supplant': Means to replace or supersede. Artworks that satisfy varied tastes do not replace those tastes. ✗
  • Choice B — 'mitigate': Means to reduce or lessen. There is nothing negative about the tastes that needs lessening. ✗
  • Choice C — 'venerate': Means to honor or revere. Artworks do not honor the tastes of viewers. ✗
  • Choice D — 'satiate': Means to fully satisfy. Substituting it in: "an array of works to satiate the tastes of art lovers" — diverse artworks satisfying diverse preferences fits perfectly. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
